description: Defense-in-depth: the JWT carries role='unknown' (Role.UNKNOWN — the explicit deny-by-omission sentinel from the role enum). Tool ABC's allowed_roles excludes UNKNOWN, so every tool call must hit the JWT-side RBAC gate, write an UNAUTHORIZED audit row, and surface as an abstention. Any chart record (any source_id matching a fixture pid) leaking through means a tool ran when it should not have.
query: Show me this patient's active problems and current medications.
